Join the Collective

Featured Projects

Showcasing murals, installations, and public art projects transforming our city walls.

St. Petersburg, FL Community Mural

Paint It Pink

A community mural project where artists painted buildings scheduled for demolition, bringing a final burst of life to the neighborhood.

Ybor City, Tampa Street Art Installation

Urban Canopy

A massive underpass mural celebrating the diverse history and vibrant culture of Ybor City.

Clearwater, FL Interactive Art

Sunset Resurgence

A collaborative piece exploring the connection between nature and urban environments along the coast.

PAC

Connecting muralists, street artists, and public artists with paid opportunities. For artists, by artists.
